description: A landscape painting showing a calm lake or estuary stretching to the horizon under a sky of blue with golden-edged clouds. On the left, a wooded hillside with tall pine trees descends to the water's edge, its dark silhouette reflected in the still surface. In the foreground, tufts of marsh grass emerge from shallow water. The overall palette moves from warm golden tones at the horizon to cool blues in the water and sky. The scene is peaceful and expansive.
